channel.title: Note on Reion's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Note on Reion's Blog

item.title: A Finder Resume Copy Issue
item.description:
I hit a weird Finder copy failure the other day.

This was on macOS Sequoia. The copy failed halfway, and Finder said I could resume it. I didn’t really want to trust that.

item.title: Android Photo Export Pitfall
item.description:
adb pull can mess up file timestamps when exporting photos from Android if you forget -a.

adb pull -a /storage/emulated/0/DCIM ./DCIM

That flag is easy to miss. It saves a lot of cleanup later.
